projects.details: Scientific investigation involving laboratory testing and collecting information from other sources.

practicals.title: Basic Laboratory Techniques (Cutting, Bending, Drawing out glass tube; Boring a cork)
practicals.details: Micro-chemical methods should be used wherever possible.

practicals.title: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances (Melting/Boiling point, Crystallization)
practicals.details: Determination of melting/boiling points; Crystallization of Alum, Copper Sulphate, or Benzoic Acid.

practicals.title: Experiments based on pH
practicals.details: Determination of pH using universal indicator/pH paper; Comparing strong/weak acids; Study of common-ion effect.

practicals.title: Chemical Equilibrium studies (Shift in equilibrium)
practicals.details: Study shift between ferric ions/thiocyanate or [Co(H2O)6]2+/chloride ions by changing concentrations.

practicals.title: Quantitative Estimation (Titration)
practicals.details: Preparation of standard solutions; Determination of strength of NaOH/HCl using Oxalic acid/Sodium Carbonate.

practicals.title: Qualitative Analysis
practicals.details: Determination of one anion and one cation in a given salt; Detection of Nitrogen, Sulphur, Chlorine in organic compounds.

practicals.title: Surface Chemistry (Sol preparation)
practicals.details: Preparation of lyophilic and lyophobic sols; Dialysis; Study of emulsifying agents.

practicals.title: Chemical Kinetics
practicals.details: Effect of concentration/temperature on reaction rate (Sodium Thiosulphate/HCl); Clock reactions.

practicals.title: Thermochemistry
practicals.details: Enthalpy of dissolution, neutralization, or interaction between Acetone and Chloroform.

practicals.title: Electrochemistry (Cell potential variation)
practicals.details: Variation of cell potential in Zn/Zn2+ || Cu2+/Cu with change in electrolyte concentration.

practicals.title: Chromatography
practicals.details: Separation of pigments from leaves/flowers; Separation of constituents in an inorganic mixture.

practicals.title: Preparation of Inorganic Compounds
practicals.details: Preparation of double salts (Ferrous Ammonium Sulphate, Potash Alum) or Potassium Ferric Oxalate.

practicals.title: Preparation of Organic Compounds
practicals.details: Preparation of Acetanilide, Di-benzal acetone, p-Nitroacetanilide, Aniline yellow, or 2-Naphthol Aniline dye.

practicals.title: Tests for functional groups
practicals.details: Unsaturation, alcoholic, phenolic, aldehydic, ketonic, carboxylic and amino (Primary) groups.

practicals.title: Characteristic tests of carbohydrates, fats and proteins
practicals.details: Detection in pure samples and given foodstuffs.
